title: Test federation against ActivityPub.Academy
description: ActivityPub.Academy is a throwaway Mastodon instance specifically for debugging AP implementations. Create an account, test follow/post roundtrips between broadside and the Academy instance. Broadside is one-way, so test: follow from Academy, receive posts, verify profile rendering.
close_reason: Discovery checks pass via ngrok (WebFinger, actor doc, NodeInfo). Full follow/delivery test requires stable domain.
